scope.summary: Resolve the conditional F-S3 compatibility-fix bead as an evidence-backed no-op: the pinned local Google ADK audit reproduced no server or ADK defect requiring a client-specific or client-neutral server patch.
out_of_scope: Gemini declaration acceptance and live Vertex AI agent orchestration.
Successful Oracle connectivity, live database semantics, and database round trips.
Cancellation behavior, because the database-free fixture has no faithful long-running tool call.
OAuth, mTLS, and remote Streamable HTTP deployment.
Any GCP showcase, recording, documentation, release, or deployment work outside the conditional F-S3 fix bead.

entry_points.name: Google ADK McpToolset stdio lifecycle
entry_points.trace: compatibility.json records three PASS stdio sessions against the exact copied oraclemcp binary: two protected sessions plus one schema-only session, MCP 2025-11-25 negotiation, tools/list, representative tools/call, idempotent close, and zero remaining server PIDs.

entry_points.name: full MCP tool-schema conversion
entry_points.trace: compatibility.json records 43/43 protected declarations and 60/60 schema-only ADMIN declarations converted into ADK/GenAI callable declarations, with zero conversion failures and per-tool results.

entry_points.name: fail-closed refusal and same-session recovery
entry_points.trace: compatibility.json records a DDL preview blocked by the READ_ONLY ceiling, oracle_query returning typed OPERATING_LEVEL_TOO_LOW as a tool result, INVALID_ARGUMENTS classification, and successful metadata calls afterward in the same ADK session.

entry_points.name: Streamable HTTP per-client bearer
entry_points.trace: compatibility.json records loopback-only bearer-authenticated initialize, tools/list, metadata call, typed invalid-argument response, same-session recovery, ADK client close, and explicit local listener teardown.

limitations: This closure proves only the local, network-isolated MCP compatibility surface for Python 3.12.13, google-adk 2.5.0, google-genai 2.11.0, and mcp 1.28.1.
Gemini declaration acceptance and live Vertex AI orchestration are NOT_TESTED; local ADK/GenAI declaration construction is not a model API acceptance test.
No successful Oracle connection occurred and no database round trip was made; live Oracle semantics are NOT_TESTED.
Cancellation is NOT_TESTED because the database-free fixture has no faithful long-running call.
OAuth, mTLS, and remote HTTP are NOT_TESTED; only explicit plain loopback Streamable HTTP with a service-owned per-client bearer was exercised.
The durable repository bundle is normalized and checksum-bound; raw secret-scanned logs remain untracked under target/g5-adk-compat and are not claimed as durable evidence.
No required-proof/v1 artifact exists for this close, so readiness remains not-ready with scoped-test basis.
